name: SerpApi - Search Engine Results Page API
description: SerpApi provides a real-time API to access search engine results. It parses Google (and other engine) results and returns structured JSON data including organic results, knowledge graphs, local packs, ads, and more. Commonly used for SEO research, SERP tracking, and competitive analysis.
